nasb.text: These were the heads of their fathers’ households, even Epher, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah and Jahdiel, mighty men of valor, famous men, heads of their fathers’ households.

esv.text: These were the heads of their fathers’ houses: Epher, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty warriors, famous men, heads of their fathers’ houses.

cnv.text: 以下這些人是他們各家族的族長：以弗、以示、以列、亞斯列、耶利米、何達威雅和雅疊；他們都是英勇的戰士，著名的人物，也是各家族的族長。

ccb.text: 他们的族长以弗、以示、以列、亚斯列、耶利米、何达威雅、雅叠都是英勇的战士，是著名的人物和各家族的首领。
